description: Implement Record-Level Security (RLS) on the 'demodb' database to restrict customer profile access by region. Create a role named 'RegionalManager' that extends the 'reader' role and create two users, 'manager_eu' and 'manager_na', with the password 'management_access' assigned to this role. Configure the '_allowRead' property on the 'Profiles' class so that 'manager_eu' can only access profiles with European nationalities (Italian, German, French, Spanish, Dutch, British, Greek) and 'manager_na' can only access profiles with North American nationalities (American, Canadian, Mexican, Brazilian). Access the database at http://localhost:2480/studio/index.html using credentials root / GymAnything123!.
